description: Creates symlinks to the input files in the job results directory. This is intended to be a helper module for creating scatter-gather pipelines.  Note that this module is not supported on Windows
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## CreateSymlinks GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CreateSymlinks is a GenePattern module that Creates symlinks to the input files in the job results directory. This is intended to be a helper module for creating scatter-gather pipelines.  Note that this module is not supported on Windows

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 1 parameters:
- Required: input.files
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>createsymlinks.pl --inputfilelist <input.files>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation
